title: rubus niveus var. niveus
intro: Rubus niveus var. niveus, also known as the White Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus niveus var. niveus include its ability to aid in digestion, lower blood pressure, and act as an anti-cancer agent, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health concerns. Rubus niveus var. niveus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried fruit, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves, stems, and fruit.
